prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Khusela idatha usebenzisa isitshixo usebenzisa imowudi ye-CBC. Iibhayithi zesitshixo ezibonelelweyo zide ngokwaneleyo (> = 64 bytes) kuzo zonke iialgorithms ezikhoyo. Khetha ialgorithm enye kuphela ukuze usebenzise kwaye usebenzise isandulela seebhayithi zesitshixo ezibonelelweyo ezihambelana nobude obufunekayo. UKUKHALA ukhethe ialgorithm ngokusekwe kubude besitshixo. Buyisela idatha ebhaliweyo, IV (ivektori yokuqalisa), kunye nesitshixo esisetyenziselwa ukubethelela. Args: isitshixo (ibhayithi): Iibhayithi zokuvelisa isitshixo sokubethelela. idatha (ibhayithi): Idatha yokubethelela. Buyisela: Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Idatha ebhaliweyo, IV, kunye nesitshixo esisetyenziselwa ukubethelela.'''
